summary: GetSyncState COALESCEs nullable sync_state columns and scans last_synced_at via sql.NullTime.
reason: Generated store.go scanned last_cursor/last_synced_at/total_count into bare string/time.Time/int; a NULL column errors 'converting NULL to string is unsupported', and every caller discards the error, silently forcing a re-sync from page 1. This is a generator-template defect (filed as a retro candidate).
validated_outcome: go build + go vet clean; store package tests pass; pre-fix GetSyncState errored on a NULL last_cursor with count=0.
